name: BROADWIND, INC.
summary: As used in this Annual Report, the terms we, us, our, Broadwind and the Company refer to Broadwind,Inc., a Delaware corporation headquartered in Cicero, Illinois, and its wholly-owned subsidiaries (the Subsidiaries). Dollars are presented in thousands unless otherwise stated. Business Overview Broadwind is a precision manufacturer of structures, equipment and components for power generation, critical infrastructure,and other specialized applications.
